summary: Backend-only testing for SignBridge AI completed. 15/15 pytest tests passed covering health, phrases (14 entries seeded), conversations/messages CRUD with message_count increment, Gemini-powered voice-to-sign + sign-to-voice translation, ElevenLabs TTS proxy (upstream 401 as expected, properly wrapped), sign detection logging, feedback, and Snowflake-style analytics. No MongoDB _id leaks observed in any response.

minor.issue: ElevenLabs returns 401 'detected_unusual_activity' from cloud IPs (EXPECTED per user choice). Backend correctly wraps upstream error in HTTPException JSON. Frontend SpeechSynthesis fallback handles this. NOT a bug.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context manager (non-blocking, low priority).
_match_signs() does substring matching on label/key — acceptable for MVP but may produce false positives for short tokens (e.g., 'no' matched in 'know'). Consider word-boundary regex.
tts/speak passes upstream raw error text into HTTPException detail (truncated to 200 chars). Acceptable; logs full error.
All endpoints return clean JSON without Mongo _id (uses projection {_id:0}). Good practice.
Single 525-line server.py is within file-size guideline but approaching split threshold; consider splitting routes/services if it grows.
seed_data_creation: Phrase catalog auto-seeds 14 entries on backend startup. Tests created TEST_-prefixed conversations/messages/feedback rows in MongoDB (not auto-cleaned).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_signbridge.py and are pytest-based. ElevenLabs TTS will return 401 from this datacenter — that's expected and the test allows non-2xx as long as the proxy wraps it. Gemini calls cost 1-3s each; tests use 60s timeouts. BASE_URL is read from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
